mcphub.description: MCP Hub — aggregates filesystem, sqlite, fetch, and docker MCPs

skill-agent.description: General-purpose skill agent using MiniCPM5 1B. Use for skill calls, tool use, and routine sub-agent tasks.

skill-agent-2.description: Skill agent 2 using MiniCPM5 1B. Use for parallel skill calls concurrent with other skill agents.

skill-agent-3.description: Skill agent 3 using MiniCPM5 1B. Use for parallel skill calls concurrent with other skill agents.

skill-agent-4.description: Skill agent 4 using MiniCPM5 1B. Use for parallel skill calls concurrent with other skill agents.
